query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(DISTINCT u.id) as total_users,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN u.hasRegistered = 1 THEN u.id END) as registered_users,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ch.userId) as users_with_cycles,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ch.deviceId) as guest_devices,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ch.id) as total_cycles
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN cycle_history ch ON u.id = ch.userId;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.root --database EorxrxCPNFVtGo7gjBVrJr --execute 
SELECT 
  COUNT(DISTINCT u.id) as total_users,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN u.hasRegistered = 1 THEN u.id END) as registered_users,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ch.userId) as users_with_cycles,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ch.deviceId) as guest_devices,
  COUNT(DISTINCT ch.id) as total_cycles
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN cycle_history ch ON u.id = ch.userId;
